title: Oars and Moria’s Nightmare: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm sure the government loves you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you were to go on vacation,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Where would you like to go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I know how your power works!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you here for a fight!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I have something to report to you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Regarding Crocodile's Demotion from the Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: Kishishishi, why didn't you say so?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: They are afraid that another Shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: may be toppled by the strawberries.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: There is no certainty in battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: to be defeated at Enies Lobby?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #8, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #18, Unknown person #15, focusing on the immediate stakes of oars and moria’s nightmare: key exchange.
